headline: Lindsay Q2 Earnings Miss Estimates, Revenues Decrease 7% Y/Y
summary: LNN Q2 earnings plunge 53% and revenues drop 7% y/y, hit by weak irrigation demand and a steep decline in infrastructure sales.
